. 0 ⭐
MABY

Games of luck & nerve — easy to start, impossible to master.

🎲 PvP · HOTSEAT

Dice Royale

Two players, one table. Roll to build points, bank to keep them — but roll a 1 and lose it all. First to 100 wins.

Play 🚀 PvE · PUSH YOUR LUCK

Rocket Crash

The multiplier climbs higher and higher. Cash out before the rocket crashes — wait too long and it all blows up.

Play ⚪ PvE · PURE CHANCE

Plinko

Drop a ball through a field of pegs and watch it bounce. Center pays little, the rare outer edges pay up to 9×.

Play 💎 PvE · PUSH YOUR LUCK

Crystal Mines

Dig for gems on a hidden grid. Every gem multiplies your bet — but one bomb ends it all. Cash out... if you dare.

Play
How it works: Each game gives you a fresh chip balance that resets on reload — built for quick, fun runs. A Telegram Mini App built with TypeScript & Vite. More games coming soon.
🎮Games 👤Profile
